summary: Remove 5 deprecated functions across 3 packages to improve code maintainability
details: Removed deprecated synchronous functions: init(), writeJsonSync(), readJsonSync() from tool-usage-tracker.js; buildGraph() from graph-builder.js; safeJsonReadSync() from safe-io index.js. All functions had async alternatives already in place. Updated exports and removed related test cases.
impact: Low - removes unused deprecated functions with no external callers
